response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience and a strong track record in distributed systems, real-time infrastructure, and open-source tooling, including some agentic AI-related work at re:cinq; however, he lacks clear evidence of executive leadership in fintech, multi-agent AI production systems at scale, or regulatory-compliant AI deployment — critical for this CTO role.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven systems and real-time infrastructure across multiple languages and domains.
Demonstrated contributions to agentic AI tooling (MCP code generators) and open-source frameworks with production use.
Proven ability to build and lead engineering culture through workshops, TDD advocacy, and dev-ops infrastructure.
concerns: No clear evidence of leading engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people or developing senior technical leadership layers.
Lack of demonstrated experience in fintech infrastructure, credit risk systems, or regulated AI deployment environments.
Minimal mention of LLM evaluation, model-agnostic architecture, or observability pipelines for production AI agents.
